decision_rule.nonreasoning_like: at least two core criteria among R2,R3,R4,R5,R7 are fail
decision_rule.primary_evaluation_scope: positive and contrast admissions only; disputed records are reported but excluded from primary sensitivity/specificity

interpretation: A seven-criterion role-conjunctive discriminator separates all frozen positive and contrast admissions while preserving both disputed records as borderline. This is a bounded project-authored result, not a universal definition or population estimate.
limitations: Semantic licenses are project-authored after the corpus was frozen and are not an independent or blind human evaluation.
The corpus is finite, synthetic, and not a private holdout.
Perfect registered-scope separation is not evidence of population-level accuracy.
Criteria are role-conjunctive and can be represented outside FARA.
nonclaims: semantic licensing is independent or evaluator-blind
disputed records are positively or negatively classified
candidate ablation and reconstruction are complete
